title: ilex spicata var. spicata
intro: Ilex spicata var. spicata is a plant species also known as the "dwarf holly" or "dwarf yaupon holly", a compact shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex spicata var. spicata are attributed to its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve overall cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and extracts.
